title: Manufacturing Engineer - Apollo Tyres - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Apollo Tyres - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Apollo Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Apollo Tyres:
Apollo Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres!
